name: exocrew
description: Codex-native production delivery harness with product, engineering, modernization, test, and operations skills for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Production delivery harness for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native production delivery harness with product thinking, engineering guardrails, system modernization, test evidence, safe operations, and verified closure for AI-assisted software delivery.
defaultPrompt: Turn this idea into a safe, testable delivery plan.
Review this change across product, engineering, modernization, test, and operations.
Modernize this system without losing contracts, parity, or cutover evidence.
Prepare this project for a controlled release with rollback evidence.
